{{Quote|I've got an offer for you you might want to hear.|Gurney, before proposing that [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] should give the [[Rakghoul serum]] to [[Zax]]|<ref name="kotor" />}}
'''Gurney''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] who lived in the [[Upper City]] during the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire's]] occupation of that [[Planet/Legends|world]]. He worked as [[Zelka Forn]]'s assistant in [[Zelka Forn's medical facility]]; however, he also worked as an informant for the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Davik Kang]] through [[Zax]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].<ref name="kotor" />

==Biography==
When Zelka expressed an interest in obtaining a sample of the [[rakghoul serum]] to the amnesiac [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], Gurney was present and overheard his boss conversing with the newcomers. As Revan and [[Carth Onasi]] were leaving the clinic, Gurney approached them, informing Revan that Davik was also interested in acquiring a sample of the serum, and that he was willing to pay much more in [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] than Zelka would ever be able to—all that Revan would have to do was present the serum to Zax, who worked at the [[Lower City]] Bounty Office. However, believing that the serum should be used to benefit the [[Outcasts (Taris)|Outcasts]], and other citizens of the planet, Revan gave the serum to Zelka, who was able to synthesize it in mass quantities. Afterward, Gurney expressed his outrage.<ref name="kotor" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Helping people is all well and good, but you have to help yourself first, right?|Gurney, to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="kotor" />}}
At first, Gurney would come off as uninterested in conversation, and would direct strangers to talk to Zelka instead. However, Gurney would later reveal himself as a greedy man, who believed in putting yourself first before others. He was willing to share any secrets with the Sith or the Exchange, for a price. He also greatly admired Davik Kang, seeing him as a role model rather than a criminal.<ref name="kotor" />

==Behind the scenes==
If the player decides to give the serum to Zax, Zelka will express his disappointment at the price Davik charges, and Gurney will congratulate the player and mention that he received a hefty finder's fee.

If the player talks to Gurney while wearing the [[Sith trooper armor/Legends|Sith armor]], he'll say that for a price, he'll tell the Sith anything they need to know.

==Appearances==
